$description: Component tokens for Mobile Input Stepper component - a horizontal number picker consisting of a Decrease button, a numeric value display, and an Increase button. Supports 2 digit display formats (Single/Double) and 5 interaction states. The two circular buttons are StepperAction sub-components. Figma Reference: Node ID 126-25937

$component.name: Input Stepper
$component.description: A horizontal stepper control that lets users increment or decrement a numeric value using circular +/- buttons. Displays the current value as a semibold number between the two buttons. Supports single-digit (0–9) and double-digit (00–99) display modes. The component delegates circular button rendering to the StepperAction sub-component.
$component.structure: Horizontal flex row (gap: 16px) containing: StepperAction (Decrease) | value text | StepperAction (Increase). No outer container border or background.

sizes.single: Single-digit display — value renders as 1 character (e.g. '0', '8')
sizes.double: Double-digit display — value renders as 2 characters with leading zero (e.g. '00', '08')

variants.default: Empty/zero state — both StepperAction buttons are Default (enabled). Value text: gray/600.
variants.filled: Non-zero state — both StepperAction buttons are Default (enabled). Value text: gray/600.
variants.disabled: Fully disabled — both StepperAction buttons are Disabled. Value text: gray/300.
variants.add-disabled: At maximum — Increase (plus) StepperAction is Disabled; Decrease (minus) is Default. Value text: gray/300.
variants.subtract-disabled: At minimum — Decrease (minus) StepperAction is Disabled; Increase (plus) is Default. Value text: gray/300.

usage.contexts: Quantity pickers, time entry fields (hours/minutes), numeric counters, quantity selectors in forms
usage.features: Two display digit formats, 5 interaction states, sub-component StepperAction buttons per side

container.$comment: Outer horizontal flex row holding [Decrease] [value] [Increase]. No background or border.

gap.description: Mobile input stepper container gap between Decrease button, value text, and Increase button - 16px

value.$comment: Numeric value text displayed between the two StepperAction buttons

typography.description: Mobile input stepper value text typography - 18px Semibold, 28px line-height (font/size/3xl, font/weight/semibold, font/line-height/3xl)

default.description: Mobile input stepper value text color in Default and Filled states - gray/600 - #475467 (both StepperAction buttons are enabled)

disabled.description: Mobile input stepper value text color in Disabled, Add Disabled, and Subtract Disabled states - gray/300 - #d0d5dd (at least one StepperAction button is disabled)
